# SelfiePostal

## What is this?
SelfiePostal is a web application for creating and sending physical personalized postcards with a vintage aesthetic.

## Core Features
- Upload personal photos or select from gallery
- Apply retro/vintage filters to images (B&W, Sepia, Vintage, Warm, Cool, Contrast)
- Write custom messages with handwritten-style fonts (Caveat, Dancing Script, Great Vibes, Lora, Merriweather, Mono)
- Send physical postcards to any address worldwide
- Fast printing and shipping (24-48 business hours)

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
- Styling: Tailwind CSS with custom vintage/retro theme
- Backend: Lovable Cloud (Supabase-powered: auth, database, edge functions)
- Payment: Stripe integration

## Product Details
- Type: Physical postcard product
- Price: EUR 2.68 (including 21% VAT)
- Shipping: Worldwide, 24-48 business hours
- Format: Premium vintage paper, standard postcard size

## User Flow
1. User selects or uploads a photo
2. User applies optional vintage filters
3. User writes a personalized message
4. User enters recipient address
5. User reviews postcard preview (front and back)
6. User pays and confirms order
7. Physical postcard is printed and shipped

## Target Audience
- Travelers wanting to send real postcards from trips
- People seeking unique, personalized gifts
- Users who value tangible, physical keepsakes over digital alternatives

## Unique Value Proposition
Combines the nostalgia of traditional postcards with modern convenience: upload any photo, customize with vintage filters, and have a real physical postcard delivered anywhere in the world.

## API Endpoints
- Authentication: Email/password signup and login
- Edge Functions: send-test-postcard (email preview)
- Database: contacts, postcards tables with RLS policies

## Contact
Built with Lovable (https://lovable.dev)
